title:
Rock climbing and indoor climbing participation statistics
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Rock climbing and indoor climbing participation statistics
Any statistics relating to participation in outdoor rock climbing and indoor climbing between 1965 and 2014 (e.g. numbers of participants, gender of participants).
Helping me with PhD research, examining the growth of rock climbing in Aotearoa c.1965-2024.
Providing clear evidence of numbers to understand growth patterns over time

### Response from Sport New Zealand
Status Data does not exist
Comments Sport NZ does not hold any statistics relating to participation in outdoor rock climbing and indoor climbing between 1965 and 2014. Therefore, your request is refused in accordance with section 18(g) of the Official Information Act 1982 as the information requested is not held, or there are no reasonable grounds to believe it is held by, or more closely connected with the functions of another Minister or agency. 

You have the right to seek an investigation and review by the Ombudsman of this decision. Information about how to make a complaint is available at www.ombudsman.parliament.nz or freephone 0800 802 602
- Natalie Looyer (Requester) 25 February 2025 at 14:56 02:56 pm (16 months ago) Hi Ann Marie, I sent this initial request to the info@data.govt.nz address, who then forwarded the request onto Sport NZ. Not sure if that helps. Many thanks, Natalie
